# Awesome One

Open-source tools, templates, and automation flows built on the One platform.

## What is One CLI?

One CLI (`one`) connects 200+ third-party platforms (Gmail, Slack, Shopify, HubSpot, Stripe, GitHub, Notion, Salesforce, etc.) through a single command-line interface. Install with `npm i -g @anthropic/one`.

## Flows

This repository contains 218+ ready-to-run automation flows converted from the most popular n8n workflow templates. Each flow runs with a single command via One CLI.

### How to use a flow

1. Install One CLI: `npm i -g @anthropic/one`
2. Connect required platforms: `one add <platform>` (e.g., `one add slack`, `one add gmail`)
3. Run the flow: `one flow execute <flow-key> --input <param>=<value>`

### Example

```bash
one add exa
one add slack
one flow execute n8n-1954-ai-agent-chat --input question="How does RAG work?" --input slackChannel="C01ABC123"
```

### Flow structure

Each flow lives in `flows/n8n/<slug>/` with:
- `README.md` — what it does, required platforms, quick start command, inputs
- `n8n-<id>-<slug>.flow.json` — the executable flow definition

### Browse flows

All flows are listed at: flows/n8n/README.md

### Key commands

- `one list` — see connected platforms
- `one add <platform>` — connect a new platform
- `one flow execute <key>` — run a flow
- `one flow list` — list available flows
- `one --agent actions search <platform> "<query>"` — find platform actions
- `one --agent guide` — full documentation

## Other resources

- Link (./link/) — Drop-in connection onboarding page for agencies
- Website: https://withone.ai
- Docs: https://withone.ai/docs
- Dashboard: https://app.withone.ai
